title: jacquemontia cayensis
intro: Jacquemontia cayensis, also known as Cayenne jasmine or morning glory, is a tropical vine native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Jacquemontia cayensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
